title: K-200 Systems Design Analysis
text:
# K-200 Systems Design Analysis

Document number: MD-DOC-475-H. Revision: H. Type: design-note. Author: Priya Nair. Created: 2023-07-14. Last modified: 2023-10-03. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Systems subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1169, P-1062.
